summary: Iteration 72 - Gestion Tab Redesign Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working - dark top bar with search + quick filters, KPI cards, Activite Recente, Dernieres Reservations table with Voir/Modifier/Annuler actions, Alert cards, Toutes les Reservations full table with sort + pagination, Planning tab with Gantt chart.
critical_code_review_comments: reservations.tsx: Well-implemented redesign matching mockup requirements with dark navy top bar (#1E3A5F), search field, quick filter tabs, and 'Creer Reservation' button.
KPI cards properly display: Reservations aujourd'hui (2), En cours (5), A venir (12), Problemes/Retards (6) with appropriate colors and icons.
Activite Recente section shows events with colored dots (red=overdue, blue=new, green=active, yellow=payment pending).
Dernieres Reservations table has correct columns: CLIENT, VEHICULE, DEBUT, STATUT, ACTIONS with Voir/Modifier/Annuler buttons.
Alert cards render correctly: 'Vehicule non rendu' (yellow), 'Paiement en attente' (blue), 'Client en retard' (red).
Toutes les Reservations full table has sortable columns (DATE DEBUT, DATE FIN, PRIX) with toggleSort function working.
Quick filters work correctly: null='Aujourd'hui', 'active'='En cours', 'upcoming'='A venir', 'overdue'='Retards', 'cancelled'='Annules'.
Action modal opens with all sections: Documents Client, Contrat, Etat des Lieux, Statut, Paiement.
Planning tab still shows Gantt chart with month navigation and color-coded reservation bars.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gestion tab redesign fully tested. Features: 1) Dark top bar with search + quick filters (Aujourd'hui/En cours/A venir/Retards/Annules) + Creer Reservation button, 2) 4 KPI cards, 3) Activite Recente with colored dots, 4) Dernieres Reservations table with Voir/Modifier/Annuler actions, 5) Alert cards (Vehicule non rendu, Paiement en attente, Client en retard), 6) Toutes les Reservations full table with sortable columns and pagination. Planning tab still shows Gantt chart.

backend_api.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns KPI data (total_vehicles, total_reservations, total_users, total_revenue, reservations_by_status)
backend_api.GET /api/admin/reservations/today: PASS - Returns today's reservations with user_name, vehicle_name, status
backend_api.GET /api/admin/overdue: PASS - Returns overdue reservations with days_overdue field
backend_api.GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule: PASS - Returns vehicle schedule for Gantt chart

playwright_tests_performed: Verify Gestion tab is default with all UI elements
Test quick filter 'En cours' - filters to active reservations
Test quick filter 'A venir' - filters to confirmed/pending reservations
Test quick filter 'Retards' - filters to overdue reservations
Test quick filter 'Annules' - filters to cancelled reservations
Test quick filter 'Aujourd'hui' - filters to today's reservations
Click 'Voir' button - verify action modal opens with all sections
Click 'Planning' tab - verify Gantt chart with month navigation
Scroll to verify full table and pagination
